title: Pushpagiri Group of Temples
tagline: Pushpagiri Group of Temples — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Pushpagiri Group of Temples, Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Pushpagiri Temple Complex is a temple complex located in Kadapa district in Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Pushpagiri Temple Complex is a temple complex located in Kadapa district in Andhra Pradesh, India. Founded around 7th Century CE, it houses some of the oldest temple congregations in the region. There are multiple legends associated with the origin of the temple complex. One of the legend says that it has come to existence from the Satya Yuga when Garuda in the process of freeing his mother from slavery has inadvertently spilled a drop of ambrosia into the surrounding lake.

topPlaces.name: Pushpagiri, Andhra Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Pushpagiri is a village in Kadapa District, in Andhra Pradesh, India. It lies on the Penna River, about 16 km to the north of Kadapa.

topPlaces.name: Khajipeta Sunkesula
topPlaces.description: Khajipeta Sunkesula is a village in YSR Kadapa district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Khajipet mandal of Badvel revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Papagni River
topPlaces.description: Papagni River is a non-perennial, inter-state river in southern India that flows through the states of Karnataka and Andhra Pradesh. It is a right bank tributary of the Pennar river.

items.note: Pushpagiri is a village in Kadapa District, in Andhra Pradesh, India. It lies on the Penna River, about 16 km to the north of Kadapa.
Khajipeta Sunkesula is a village in YSR Kadapa district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Khajipet mandal of Badvel revenue division.
Papagni River is a non-perennial, inter-state river in southern India that flows through the states of Karnataka and Andhra Pradesh. It is a right bank tributary of the Pennar river.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pushpagiri Group of Temples?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pushpagiri Group of Temples is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pushpagiri Group of Temples?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kadapa Airport (9 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (129 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pushpagiri Group of Temples?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pushpagiri Group of Temples at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pushpagiri Group of Temples?
faq.a: Stays in Pushpagiri Group of Temples start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pushpagiri Group of Temples?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pushpagiri, Andhra Pradesh, Khajipeta Sunkesula, Papagni River.
